<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject; use function sprintf; use function strtolower; use PHPUnit\Framework\Constraint\Constraint; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final class MethodNameConstraint extends Constraint { private string $methodName; public function __construct(string $methodName) { $this->methodName = $methodName; } public function toString(): string { return sprintf( 'is "%s"', $this->methodName, ); } protected function matches(mixed $other): bool { return strtolower($this->methodName) === strtolower((string) $other); } }
